reviews.comment:
Tenes que consumir algo para usar el baño pero el baño es un asco. La que atiende deja  bastante que desear

(Translated by Google)
You have to buy something to use the bathroom, but the bathroom is disgusting. The attendant leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWWE1XMXpVbUpvZEhkcFRFODRaMFZaU0V4d2NVRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de la chica que estaba en la caja hoy, 15
de Julio a las 13 horas, fue fatal, no me dejó usar el baño porque no quería "que lo ensusiara" no sé de que me vió cara, pendiente con su personal y a darles curso de atención al cliente, pdt: éramos 5 personas que íbamos a almorzar, trabajamos cerca, ni de casualidad volvemos!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the cashier today, July 15th at 1 PM, was terrible. She wouldn't let me use the restroom because she didn't want me to "make it dirty." I don't know what she thought of me. You need to address this with your staff and provide them with customer service training. P.S.: There were five of us going to lunch; we work nearby. We'll never be back!

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Eileen, en función de tus comentarios agradeceré si te podes asercar por la estacion y solicitar hablar con el concesionario por lo ocurrido, no obstante vamos a buscar registros de cámaras para reforzar. Muchas gracias.

reviews.comment:
La vendedora te obliga basicamente a comprar algo para usar el baño y el baño esta todo sucio y sin papel 🤌🏻
15' esperando que ella termine de chusmear por telefono, se fueron 2 clientes porque nunca los atendio

(Translated by Google)
The saleswoman basically forces you to buy something to use the bathroom, and the bathroom is filthy and has no toilet paper 🤌🏻
I waited 15 minutes for her to finish gossiping on her phone, and two customers left because she never served them.
